prompt: /sketch 登录模块的 token 刷新逻辑有问题，到期前 5 分钟应该静默刷新，现在是到期后才刷新导致有短暂的 401

assertions.text: sketch/ directory was created in the working directory
The idea content appears verbatim (not summarized) in ideas.md — should contain 'token' and '401' and '静默刷新'
ideas.md contains a timestamp in YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM format
ideas.md contains a **Context**: line with a path
Response to user is brief (under 30 words)
